title: Making Electro-Competent E. coli Cells and Transformation
author: Jasper Koehorst
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.vzfe73n

steps.title: 400 mL, LB/ w/o salt in...
steps.instruction: 400 mL, LB/ w/o salt in 1 Liter erlenmeyer flask + overnight culture 0.2 Genome copies per ml, OD600 Original: Next day, first thing in the morning, inoculate 400 ml LB w/o salt in a 1 l Erlenmeyer flask with enough of the overnight culture to reach OD600 of 0.2 and incubate for ~3 hours to OD600 0.5-1.0.

steps.title: 0 °C, ice 00:15:00 Original: Transfer...
steps.instruction: 0 °C, ice 00:15:00 Original: Transfer culture volume to 8 Greiner tubes of 50 ml and cool on ice for 15 minutes.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 00:10:00, 2000 g 4 °C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 00:10:00, 2000 g 4 °C

steps.title: Discard supernatant and add 5 mL...
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant and add 5 mL of 10 % volume, glycerol , resuspend the pellet in it and then add 45 mL of 10 % volume, glycerol , shake by hand a few times to mix.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 10 minutes at 2000g and 4°C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 10 minutes at 2000g and 4°C.

steps.title: Discard supernatant and add 5ml of...
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant and add 5ml of 10% glycerol, resuspend the pellet in it and then add 45ml of 10% glycerol, shake by hand a few times to mix.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 10 minutes at 2000g and 4°C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 10 minutes at 2000g and 4°C.

steps.title: Discard supernatant and resuspend the pellet...
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant and resuspend the pellet in 1 ml ice-cold 10% glycerol, pool the contents of all 8 tubes into one tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 5 minutes at 1500g and 4°C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 5 minutes at 1500g and 4°C.

steps.title: Discard supernatant and add 400 μl...
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant and add 400 μl 10% glycerol (this will result in ~800 μl suspension).

steps.title: Make aliquots of 40μl in pre-cooled...
steps.instruction: Make aliquots of 40μl in pre-cooled eppendorf tubes and flash freeze with N2(l). Store at -80°C.

steps.title: Inoculate 5 mL, LB w/o salt...
steps.instruction: Inoculate 5 mL, LB w/o salt in 50ml tube + 2 µL, E.coli + 37 °C + 12:00:00, Overnight Original: Inoculate 5 ml LB w/o saltin a 50 ml culturing tube withE. coliand incubate overnight at 37°C / 250 rpm
1.Next day, first thing in the morning, inoculate 400 ml LB w/o salt in a 1 l Erlenmeyer flask with enough of the overnight culture to reach OD600 of 0.2 and incubate for ~3 hours to OD600 0.5-1.0.
3.Transfer culture volume to 8 Greiner tubes of 50 ml and cool on ice for 15 minutes.
5.Discard supernatant and add 5ml of 10% glycerol, resuspend the pellet in it and then add 45ml of 10% glycerol, shake by hand a few times to mix.
7.Discard supernatant and add 5ml of 10% glycerol, resuspend the pellet in it and then add 45ml of 10% glycerol, shake by hand a few times to mix.
10.Discard supernatant and resuspend the pellet in 1 ml ice-cold 10% glycerol, pool the contents of all 8 tubes into one tube.
12.Discard supernatant and add 400 μl 10% glycerol (this will result in ~800 μl suspension).
13.Make aliquots of 40μl in pre-cooled eppendorf tubes and flash freeze with N2(l). Store at -80°C.

steps.title: 03:00:00 37 °C 0
steps.instruction: 03:00:00 37 °C 0.5 Genome copies per ml, OD600 <between> 1.0 Genome copies per ml, OD600
